title: phaius inquilinus
intro: Phaius inquilinus, also known as the Chinese orchid or snake's tongue orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Phaius inquilinus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers and roots are often dried and made into teas, decoctions, or powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
